tasks.title: Mock Interview: Simulate 2-3 rounds with a focus on behavioral and conceptual questions.

schedule.tip: Practice with mock interviews to gauge your responses and identify areas for improvement, especially considering the less documented interview process at Nasdaq, allowing you to simulate potential interview scenarios.

tasks.title: Mock Interview: Simulate 2-3 rounds, focusing on articulating your project contributions and technical knowledge.

schedule.tip: Use your second mock interview to address any potential work-life balance or management concerns, as these are mentioned as red flags, and practice articulating your approach to such situations.
